subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Upon thee be the peace of God and His mercy! Death, in one station, is a door unto union, and a path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک سلام الله و رحمته موت در یک مقام بابیست از برای وصال و سبیلی است
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual transformation, @unity; oneness of humanity, @soul; spirit after death, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
